# Pull request

Thanks for contributing. Please fill in the sections below — it speeds up review.

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, in 1-3 sentences? -->

## Why

<!-- Link the issue, or describe the motivation. Use "Fixes #123" to auto-close. -->

Fixes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Build / CI

## How was it tested

<!-- Describe the tests you added or ran. -->

- [ ] `yarn lint` passes
- [ ] `yarn typecheck` passes
- [ ] `yarn test` passes
- [ ] New or updated tests cover the change

## Affected workspaces

<!-- Tick all that apply. -->

- [ ] `apps/api`
- [ ] `apps/cli`
- [ ] `apps/worker`
- [ ] `packages/*` (list: ____ )

## License

- [ ] I confirm my contribution is under the project's license
      ([AGPL-3.0](../LICENSE)).

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] I have linked the relevant issue (if any).
- [ ] I have not introduced secrets, credentials, or `.env` files.
